creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 210026
v1

*_qsv encoders in FFmpeg support more features, see https://trac.ffmpeg.org/wiki/Hardware/QuickSync#VAAPIVSlibmfx
Chasing ArchLinux package, see https://git.archlinux.org/svntogit/community.git/commit/?h=packages/emby-server&id=232791d2d0fa

Disclaimer: I don't use emby-server. The change was only build tested but h264_qsv works fine in *system* ffmpeg.
